actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},


While Monero cannot be purchased or sold directly, it will be easy for you to trade into once you've acquired some cryptocurrency.


Most cryptocurrencies out there, require to be traded into from another cryptocurrency. This is because the exchanges that interact with fiat money (on & off ramps) must be compliance with regulations, and may only be able to offer a narrow range of top crypto assets - ones with lots of liquidity, for example BTC, ETH or LTC. In this case, it will require one extra hop for you to acquire XMR.


First buy any cryptocurrency, ideally one with less fees like LTC or BCH -- then you will be able to use the Exchange tab to easily swap that into Monero.


Please let us know if you have more questions!
